runTitle: Production Cloud Run direct API post-deploy QA - v8.12.108 boundary guard regression
coveredSurfaces: Cloud Run /health returned version 8.12.108 after GitLab tag pipeline 2582927769 succeeded
Cloud Run service resource limits remained free-tier aligned at cpu=1 and memory=512Mi
Cloud Run /monitoring unauthenticated boundary returned 403 as expected
direct API network-ranking prompt returned deterministic monitoring-metric-ranking response
direct API contextual follow-up prompt returned deterministic metric ranking response
direct API unsupported GPU metric prompt returned HTTP 500 instead of deterministic unsupported-metric clarification
direct API explicit unknown server prompt returned HTTP 500 or LLM fallback instead of deterministic not-found clarification
direct API ambiguous single-server prompt returned LLM clarification instead of deterministic boundary guard
direct API inverse-status prompt returned correct deterministic content but metadata still reported Analyst Agent
skippedSurfaces: Browser AI sidebar was not repeated because this deployment-stage check isolated Cloud Run direct supervisor behavior
Langfuse trace deep-dive was deferred until the follow-up fix deployment

plannerShadowObservations.source: Cloud Run direct API response and Cloud Logging validation errors
Cloud Run direct API response metadata

expertAssessments.rationale: The production direct API exposed that monitoring-boundary-guard evidence used responsePolicy=deterministic_clarification, but supervisor deterministic short-circuit logic did not accept that policy.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Allow deterministic_clarification in supervisor deterministic evidence handling, add direct/stream entrypoint regressions, redeploy, and rerun direct API boundary prompts.

expertAssessments.rationale: Deployment mechanics, Cloud Run health, service auth boundary, and free-tier runtime limits were healthy; the failure is an application routing regression.

usageChecks.summary: Cloud Run ai-engine resource limits remained cpu=1 and memory=512Mi after deployment.
usageChecks.evidence: gcloud run services describe ai-engine --region asia-northeast1

artifacts.label: v8.12.108 Cloud Run direct API boundary post-deploy failure evidence

pendingImprovements.title: Cloud Run direct supervisor must short-circuit deterministic boundary clarifications
pendingImprovements.evidence: v8.12.108 direct API: unsupported GPU and explicit unknown-server prompts reached LLM/tool-call paths and produced HTTP 500 or non-deterministic fallback.
pendingImprovements.note: Root cause identified locally: deterministic_clarification was not included in shouldUseDeterministicDomainEvidenceAnswer.

notes: Post-deploy QA was run against Cloud Run direct API after v8.12.108 release pipeline success.
Cloud Logging showed AI SDK tool validation failures for invalid metric=gpu and unavailable getServerMetrics tool call, confirming the boundary guard did not short-circuit before LLM tool planning.
No secret values or API keys were recorded.
